title: Financial Market Basic Course
content:
## Financial Market Basic Course:

# First Step to Financial world

This is basic financial course which includes all the basic understanding required for advance level course. The course includes the money and capital market concepts, Primary and secondary market concepts. Familiarization of Equity, commodity, currency market and their segments like Cash, Futures and Options. Various tools awareness to carry out Buy and Sell order executions. Know the Fundamental and Technical analysis parameters and difference in their philosophies, Understand various types of charts and their readings.

  

## Financial Market Basic Course

###  Our Duration 

 The duration for training program is 2 week 

###  Training Schedule 

 Training sessions are conducted every week 

###  Payment Term 

 The fee is non-negotiable, but part payment may be allowed at the mentor's discretion. 

## Financial Market Basic Course Includes

- Introduction to Financial Market
- Capital and Money Market
- Stock market and Functions
- Commodity market and Function
- Currency Market and Function
- Crypto Market and Function
- Cash-Future-Options Segments
- Returns and Risks
- Alerts/Tax/Software

 For Whom 

- Beginners or Fresher in stock market
- Investors /Traders
- Students seeking First Step in Market
- Homemakers/Housewife's
- Eager to learn Market Movement
- Experienced seeking fresh start

 Benefits 

- Understanding for Money and Capital Market
- Awareness of Primary and Secondary Market
- Material (Specially Designed for Professionals)
- First step understanding for Financial Market
- Technical Charts and their understanding
- Direction for advance course on Stock Market

 Why 

- Designed for New comers who want to grow his /her knowledge about financial Market
- Making Capital and Money Market understanding simple rather than complex to become Next Level trader/ Investor
- The marking on chart based on each Sessions will benefit to test the knowledge and skills
- You can obtain the knowledge and tools required to treat trading like a business.

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE COURSE? 

- Beginners or Fresher in stock market
- Investors /Traders
- Students seeking First Step in Market
- Homemakers/Housewife's
- Eager to learn Market Movement
- Experienced seeking fresh start

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Understanding for Money and Capital Market
- Awareness of Primary and Secondary Market
- Material (Specially Designed for Professionals)
- First step understanding for Financial Market
- Technical Charts and their understanding
- Direction for advance course on Stock Market

###  PURPOSE OF COURSE 

- This course is Designed for New comers who want to grow his /her knowledge about financial Market
- This course content is making Capital and Money Market understanding simple rather than complex to become Next Level trader/ Investor
- The marking on chart based on each Sessions will benefit to test the knowledge and skills

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- As time is precious. You are required to come on time in session
- You are required to maintain the positive decorum in session. Short dresses/unprofessional dresses are strictly not allowed
- Providing Training on Stock Market is being taken very seriously by “Profit and Stocks” Homework related to marking on charts will be given after each session to have understanding on the subject taken
- You need to have a meeting Online or Offline before registration
- As Training holds a big responsibility, Students need to meet with their Parents or Guardian. No registration for students without Parents / Guardian approval
- One needs to pay ₹ 2000 (part of training fees) after the meeting, to be part of the next available batch
- You are required to pay the fees within the first 2 sessions of course
- After joining, you are required to attend all sessions as each session is Next step from the previous session, if due to any unavoidable circumstances, you are not able to attend, you need to inform proactively
- Only one session, if missed, will be repeated to align trainees to the next level session
- If two or more sessions are missed, you will be considered in Next Batch available-no fees charges as already paid
- 2 months free consultation will be provided post training for review and development
- After the free consultation period, Consultation fees of 1100/- is applicable
- Pictures and Video making are not allowed during the training

title: Basic Finance for Youngs
content:
## Basic Finance for Youngs:

# Building Strong Financial Foundations

This is basic financial course designed for young learners, teens, and beginners to build a strong foundation in personal finance and smart money management.

  

## Basic Finance for Youngs

###  Our Duration 

 The duration for training program is 2 week 

###  Training Schedule 

 Training sessions are conducted every week 

###  Payment Term 

 The fee is non-negotiable, but part payment may be allowed at the mentor's discretion. 

## Basic Finance Includes

- Introduction to Basic Finance
- Money Concepts
- Income and sources
- Earning and savings
- Banking and Investments
- Financial Goals and Financial Planning
- Returns and Risks
- Wants and Needs
- Insurance

 For Whom 

- Young learners, teens, and beginners in financial planning
- Students seeking a solid foundation in money management
- Anyone eager to understand banking, savings, and investments early

 Benefits 

- Strong foundational understanding of income, savings, and investments
- Financial goal setting and planning techniques
- Practical approach to managing wants vs needs and understanding risk vs return

 Why 

- Helps young minds build smart financial habits early in life
- Makes money and finance concepts simple and engaging
- Prepares students for independent financial decision-making

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE COURSE? 

- Young learners, teens, and beginners in financial planning
- Students seeking a solid foundation in money management
- Anyone eager to understand banking, savings, and investments early

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Strong foundational understanding of income, savings, and investments
- Financial goal setting and planning techniques
- Practical approach to managing wants vs needs and understanding risk vs return

###  PURPOSE OF COURSE 

- To instill smart financial habits early in life
- Making money concepts simple and actionable for young minds

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- As time is precious. You are required to come on time in session
- You need to have meeting Online or Offline before registration
- As Training hold big responsibility, Students need to meet with their Parents or Guardian. No registration for students without Parents / Guardian approval
- One need to pay ₹ 2000 (part of training fees) after meeting to be part of next available batch
- 2 months free consultation will be provided post training for review and development

title: Pro Trader Course-From Confusion to Clarity
content:
## Pro Trader Course:

# From Confusion to Clarity

The Pro Trader course is a comprehensive training program. It is designed to provide traders with all the knowledge and tools they will need to become successful professional traders. From market structure and market harmonics to advanced pattern recognition, Fibonacci analysis, trader psychology, strategy development, back-testing, money management, trade plan development, and understanding practical approach towards market movement (direction and speed).

  

## Pro Trader Course- From Confusion to Clarity

###  Our Duration 

 The duration for training program is 7 week 

###  Training Schedule 

 Training sessions are conducted every week 

###  Payment Term 

 The fee is non-negotiable, but part payment may be allowed at the mentor's discretion. 

## Pro Trader Course- From Confusion to Clarity Course Includes

- Introduction-Pro Trader Course
- What is Technical Analysis?
- Types and interpreting charts
- Trend analysis-Fake and Real
- Trend Change Analysis
- Market Structure Analysis
- Structure and Ratio Analysis
- Structure and Indicators
- Understanding Direction and Speed
- Professional Trading -Eagle eye view
- Trade Plan and Journal
- Explain your Trade

 For Whom 

- Who have attended Basic Financial market course
- Investors /Traders
- Experienced Investor / traders
- Financial advisor, Financial Analyst
- Eager to learn Market Direction and Movement
- Students (permission from Parents / Guardian required)

 Benefits 

- Develop a winning mindset to handle market ups and downs.
- Master structured, proven strategies that work across different markets.
- Trade Plan Development (Specific to your needs) based on Technical Analysis
- Learn risk & money management techniques to protect your capital.
- Trade live with expert guidance and gain real-time market experience.
- Achieve financial independence by becoming a self-sufficient trader.

 Why 

- I will help you identify and eliminate bad habits that are hindering your success.
- You learn a variety of time-tested strategies that you can employ immediately.
- We devote a lot of time helping you prepare for the mental challenges of trading.
- You can obtain the knowledge and tools required to treat trading like a business.

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE COURSE? 

- Who have attended Basic Financial market course
- Investors /Traders
- Experienced Investor / traders
- Financial advisor, Financial Analyst
- Eager to learn Market Direction and Movement
- Students (permission from Parents / Guardian required)

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Trade Plan Development (Specific to your needs) based on Technical Analysis.
- Material (Specially Designed for Professionals).
- Investment mentorship Support for Investment Purpose (Two Months only).
- Real Trading in Live market timing with records.
- Path for independent Professional Trader
- Psychological Impact for help in trade.
- Practical approach-based Trading/ Investing.

###  PURPOSE OF COURSE 

- This course is Designed for trader who want to grow his /her investment by self-Trading & investment.
- This course content is making Market understanding simple rather than complex to become independent decision maker.
- The marking on chart based on each Sessions will benefit to test the knowledge and skills.

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- As time is precious. You are required to come on time in session
- You are required to maintain the positive decorum in session. Short dresses/unprofessional dresses are strictly not allowed
- Providing Training on Stock Market is being taken very seriously by “Profit and Stocks” Homework related to marking on charts will be given after each session to have understanding on the subject taken
- You need to have a meeting Online or Offline before registration
- As Training holds a big responsibility, Students need to meet with their Parents or Guardian. No registration for students without Parents / Guardian approval
- One needs to pay ₹ 2000 (part of training fees) after the meeting, to be part of the next available batch
- You are required to pay the fees within the first 2 sessions of course
- After joining, you are required to attend all sessions as each session is Next step from the previous session, if due to any unavoidable circumstances, you are not able to attend, you need to inform proactively
- Only one session, if missed, will be repeated to align trainees to the next level session
- If two or more sessions are missed, you will be considered in Next Batch available-no fees charges as already paid
- 2 months free consultation will be provided post training for review and development
- After the free consultation period, Consultation fees of 1100/- is applicable
- Pictures and Video making are not allowed during the training
- One needs to bring a Blank register and Green/Red/Blue pen for making notes
- You are abided by a confidentiality clause that no training material or pictures will be shared with any other person

title: Pro Trader Course- Option specific
content:
## Pro Trader Course:

# Option Specific

This is options specific course which includes all the advance understanding required for options trading, be it Option Buying or Options selling. The course includes the understanding of Options behavior with respect to underlying security movement and with respect to time to expiry. This course is in continuation to Pro trader course which emphasis to understand market direction and speed. Understand the concept and logic behind various Options (ITM, ATM, OTM) chart and its selection for trade with proper risk-reward ratio.

  

## Pro Trader Course - Options Specific

###  Our Duration 

 The duration for training program is 2 week 

###  Training Schedule 

 Training sessions are conducted every week 

###  Payment Term 

 The fee is non-negotiable, but part payment may be allowed at the mentor's discretion. 

## Pro Trader Course - Options Specific Course Includes

- Introduction-Pro Trader Course-Options
- Understanding Options
- Options -Index/Stocks/Commodity
- Options -Price and Chart
- Options -Arrow on Head
- Options -Eagle eye view

- Who have attended Basic+Pro Trader course.

- Financial advisor, Financial Analyst

- Master structured, proven strategies that work across different markets.
- Learn risk & money management techniques to protect your capital.

- Achieve financial independence by becoming a self-sufficient trader.

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Options Trade Plan Development (Specific to your needs) based on Technical Analysis.

- Real Trading in Live market timing with records.
- Path for independent Professional Trader
- Psychological Impact for help in trade.
- Practical approach-based Trading/ Investing.

###  PURPOSE OF COURSE 

- You will get to know which options to select and how these are executed.
- This course is Designed for trader who want to grow his /her investment by self-Trading & investment.
- This course content is making Market understanding simple rather than complex to become independent decision maker.
- The marking on chart based on each Sessions will benefit to test the knowledge and skills.

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- Only one session, if missed, will be repeated to align trainees to the next level session

title: Pro Trader Course-Comprehensive Course
content:
## Pro Trader Course:

# From Basic to Advance course

The Pro Trader course is a comprehensive training program. It is designed to provide traders with all the knowledge and tools they will need to become successful professional traders. From market basic concept of money and capital market and structure and market harmonics to advanced pattern recognition, Fibonacci analysis, Options specific analysis, trader psychology, strategy development, back-testing, money management, trade plan development, and understanding practical approach towards market movement (direction and speed).

This is combination of all three courses- Basic Financial Course, Pro Trader Course and Option Specific course. It is Step by Step Key direction towards understanding the practical approach to trade every segment of market.

  

## Key Details of Our Comprehensive Course

### [Financial Market Basic Course](https://profitandstocks.com/financial-market-basic-course/)

### [Pro Trader Course- From Confusion to Clarity](https://profitandstocks.com/pro-trader-course-from-confusion-to-clarity/)

title: Mentorship-one to one
content:
## Mentorship Services:

# Personalized Interaction

We are NISM/SEBI Registered Research Analyst and Provide Services for understanding and correcting the approach through the gap filling techniques. This will also help with Financial Planning based on one’s needs and constraints. Understanding what type of trade and order, one is executing. Where is entry and exit and how these can be addressed. Psychological Approach understanding and provide direction for focusing on right approach.

  

## Key Details of Mentorship Services

###  Our Duration 

 Based on appointment 

###  Training Schedule 

 Friday/ Saturday 

###  Payment Term 

 1100/- per hour 

 For Whom 

- Newcomer in Market and want to seek for right start up
- Trader/ Investor want to consult for better results.
- Person who is not able to manage Trade and Investment along with Job/Business

 Benefits 

- Start with right approach and direction for correct results.
- Get do’s and don’ts along with checklist for systematic approach
- Manage the Job/Business along with Trade/Investment

 Why 

- Psychological Approach is important for any Trader/Investor.
- Timing is crucial in market and understanding the balanced approach is must.

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE SERVICE? 

- Newcomer in Market and want to seek for right start up
- Trader/ Investor want to consult for better results.
- Person who is not able to manage Trade and Investment along with Job/Business

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Start with right approach and direction for correct results.
- Get do’s and don’ts along with checklist for systematic approach
- Manage the Job/Business along with Trade/Investment 
- Right approach towards market and trading
- Path for independent Professional Trader
- Psychological Impact for help in trade
- Practical approach-based Trading/ Investing.

###  PURPOSE OF SERVICE 

- Psychological Approach is important for any Trader/Investor
- This course content is making Market understanding simple rather than complex to become independent decision maker.
- Timing is crucial in market and understanding the balanced approach is must

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- Appointment is compulsory for Mentorship meeting
- One can share Trading record for better understating the gaps
- Meeting can Online or Offline based on Geographical location.
- As Mentorship hold big responsibility, Students need to meet with their Parents or Guardian. No registration for students without Parents / Guardian approval.
- One need to put true picture for effective Mentorship

title: NISM/SEBI certification course
content:
## NISM Certification Program:

# Goal with Boundary

We are NISM/SEBI Registered Research Analyst and Provide Training and Guidance for NISM/SEBI Certification Program. These are pre-requisites to any product business related to Financial Market. This program is certification based. For these certifications, one needs to appear in exam conducted by NISM/SEBI.

  

## Key Details of Our NISM Certification Program

###  Our Duration 

 Based on Certification (4-8weeks) 

###  Training Schedule 

 Weekend classes 

###  Payment Term 

 INR 6000 - 11000 per course 

 For Whom 

- Newcomer in Market and want to seek certification.
- Person who is looking for job where certificate is pre-requisite.
- People provide specific service and need certificate as a mandatory requirement.

 Benefits 

- Start with right approach and result oriented direction.
- Get dos and don’ts along with checklist for systematic approach
- Practice sessions with previous exams.

- Practical approach with examples.
- Statutory requirements
- Practical training beyond theoretical bookish concepts

- Start with right approach and result oriented direction.
- Get dos and don’ts along with checklist for systematic approach
- Practice sessions with previous exams.
- Manage the Job/Business along with Trade/Investment
- Psychological Approach is important for any Trader/Investor
- Timing is crucial in market and understanding the balanced approach is must
- Practical approach based preparation.

###  PURPOSE OF COURSE 

- NISM/SEBI Certificate Trainers
- Practical approach with examples.
- Statutory requirements

title: Advisory services
content:
## Advisory Services:

# Shoot the Arrow

We are NISM/SEBI Registered Research Analyst and Provide Services for recommendation for Equity, commodity. We will be intimating this through Advisory Group and based on that call, you need to initiate the trade (Buy and Sell). This group is only for members.

Daily/ Weekly Buy and Sell or Short and Close intimation   

## Key Details of Advisory Services

###  Our Duration 

 Based on Alerts Daily/Weekly 

###  Training Schedule 

 Alerts based 

###  Payment Term 

 Non-Negotiable 2000/month 
 With one time charge of 5000/- 

 For Whom 

- Newcomer in Market and want Second income
- Job/Business related person who is not having time for Trade/Invest
- People who want to invest in Market, but they don’t want to do analysis

 Benefits 

- Systematic Alerts for BUY and Sell.
- Time saving for study and waiting for entry
- Getting logical entry and exit on top 200 stocks

 Why 

- This is system based so there is no human interface for Entry and Exit Alerts
- One can’t scan top 200 stocks; it will filter out.
- No need to study again and again for set of parameters.

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE SERVICE? 

- Newcomer in Market and want Second income
- Job/Business related person who is not having time for Trade/Invest
- People who want to invest in Market, but they don’t want to do analysis

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Systematic Alerts for BUY and Sell.
- Time saving for study and waiting for entry
- Getting logical entry and exit on top 200 stocks

###  PURPOSE OF SERVICE 

- This is system based so there is no human interface for Entry and Exit Alerts
- One can’t scan top 200 stocks; it will filter out.
- No need to study again and again for set of parameters.

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers and Advisor are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- You need to have meeting Online or Offline before registration.
- One need to pay Registration fees meeting to be part of next available batch.
- You need to execute the trade based on Call
- Technical Glitch in Broker platform is beyond our control.
- The account shall be individual name. 
- You are abided by a confidentiality clause that no Trading calls shared with any other person
